coaching.phase1: Your thumbnail is your resume. Below 4% CTR, nothing else matters. Front-load value in first 7 seconds — not 15, not 30. Seven.
coaching.phase2: Retention is trust. If they clicked but left, you broke a promise. Add pattern interrupts every 30–60s.
coaching.phase34: Build for search. Say keywords naturally. Evergreen topics compound for years. Satisfaction > watch time.
